record.field:
# Clean up old completed processes (older than 30 days) from datetime import datetime, timedelta
cutoff_date = datetime.now() - timedelta(days=30) old_processes = env['bmp.process.instance'].search([ ('state', 'in', ['completed', 'failed', 'cancelled']), ('ended_at', '<', cutoff_date) ])
# Archive old activity logs for process in old_processes: # Clean consumed tokens token_manager = env['bmp.execution.engine'] if hasattr(token_manager, 'clean_consumed_tokens'): token_manager.clean_consumed_tokens(process, older_than_hours=720) # 30 days
# Process timer events # TODO: Implement timer event processing # This would check for timer events that are due and trigger them pass
